steps.title: Identify the founding purpose
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “was founded...to support Black media professionals and honor people like Barnett.” This “to” clause directly states the organization's founding purpose.

steps.title: Apply the purpose statement
steps.content:
D is correct. The “to” clause expressing founding purpose directly matches choice D. A, B, and C all mischaracterize the sentence—claiming it emphasizes challenges, highlights members, or lists achievements, respectively.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
